Class.title: Class
Class.description: A student group or subject class.

userId.description: The UID of the teacher who owns this class.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: A student enrolled in a class.

roll.description: The student's unique roll number within the class.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Daily attendance record for a class.

isOnDay.description: Whether attendance was supposed to be taken on this day.

records.description: Map of roll numbers to attendance status.

/classes/{classId}/students/{studentId}.description: Sub-collection of students in a class.
